hero.title: Learn programming visually
hero.subtitle: Clear, progressive, beautifully presented fundamentals — starting with Python.
features.title: What is CodeAtlas?
features.visual.title: Visual Learning
features.visual.desc: Concepts explained with diagrams, animations, and step-by-step visual breakdowns — not just walls of text.
features.progressive.title: Progressive Path
features.progressive.desc: A carefully ordered learning path that builds each concept on top of the last, so nothing feels random.
features.python.title: Python First
features.python.desc: Start with the most beginner-friendly language. Clean syntax, real-world use, and a massive community.
featured.title: Featured Concepts
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1.title: Pick a concept
howItWorks.step1.desc: Browse the concept map and choose what to learn next.
howItWorks.step2.title: Read & visualize
howItWorks.step2.desc: Each lesson uses visual explanations, code examples, and analogies.
howItWorks.step3.title: Practice
howItWorks.step3.desc: Test your understanding with quick quizzes at the end of each concept.
map.title: Concept Map
map.subtitle: Explore all concepts in the learning path. Filter by level to find what's right for you.
about.title: About CodeAtlas
about.description: CodeAtlas is a visual, progressive web platform for learning programming fundamentals. It's designed to be the resource I wish I had when I started learning to code — beautifully presented, thoughtfully structured, and genuinely useful.
about.philosophy.title: Design Philosophy
about.philosophy.desc: Every element serves a purpose. Dark theme reduces eye strain. Visual explanations make abstract concepts tangible. Progressive ordering ensures no concept feels random.
about.why.title: Why CodeAtlas?
about.why.desc: Most programming tutorials are either too dry, too disorganized, or too focused on syntax. CodeAtlas takes a different approach: concepts first, code second, with visuals that make ideas stick.
about.tech.title: Tech Stack
about.builtWith: Built with care, coffee, and Claude Code.
roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Where CodeAtlas is headed. This is a living project — each phase builds on the last.
roadmap.phase1.title: Phase 1 — MVP
roadmap.phase1.desc: Python fundamentals, static site, GitHub Pages deployment, EN/ES language support.
roadmap.phase2.title: Phase 2 — Interactive
roadmap.phase2.desc: Search, filters, richer animations, interactive code playground.
roadmap.phase3.title: Phase 3 — Expand
roadmap.phase3.desc: Web fundamentals, algorithms, data structures, Git & version control.
roadmap.phase4.title: Phase 4 — Platform
roadmap.phase4.desc: Optional accounts, saved progress, community contributions.
footer.tagline: Learn programming visually. One concept at a time.
